title: Drug Products RSS Feed - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug Products RSS Feed
The Health Products and Food Branch invites you to subscribe to the Really Simple Syndication (RSS) feed and obtain links to new Drug Products information when it is posted online. For more details, see Instructions .
- Prescription Drug RSS Feed
- Drug Products RSS Feed
- Common Electronic Submission Gateway
- Electronic Submissions RSS Feed
To view one of the RSS feeds online in your RSS Reader/Aggregator:
- Copy the URL link(s) located beside the topic(s) of your choice.
- Paste the URL link(s) into your reader.

## Additional Information
- More Health Canada RSS Feeds
